title: Mission to Nar Kreeta
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Mission |prev=*[[Mission to Hoth (Jaden Korr)|Mission to Hoth]] *[[Mission to Byss (Rosh Penin)|First Mission to Byss]] *[[Mission to the Valley of the Jedi]] *[[Mission to Wayland]] |conc= |next=[[Mission to Zonju V]] |image=[[File:NarKreetaRancor-JA.jpg]] |name=Mission to Nar Kreeta |conflict= |objective=Rescue [[Mining Guild elders]] |date=[[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] |place=[[Nar Kreeta]] |result=Elders rescued |side1=*[[Unidentified Hutt crime lord (Nar Kreeta)|Local crimelord]] |side2=*[[New Jedi Order]] *[[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*[[Mercenary/Legends|Mercenaries]] **3 [[Human/Legends|Humans]] **2 [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] **14 [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]] **17 [[Gran/Legends|Grans]] **10 [[Weequay/Legends|Weequays]] *A [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] *3 [[Imperial worker]]s |ppl2=*[[Jaden Korr]] *[[Kyle Katarn]] *16 [[Mining Guild elders]] |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=*All mercenaries |casual2=*Possibly some elders |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Hurry! Get us out of here before the rancor comes!
Rancor?!|[[Jaden Korr]] learns about the rancor|''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''}} The '''mission to Nar Kreeta''' was carried out in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] by [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jaden Korr]] for the [[New Jedi Order]]. ==Background== In 14 ABY, a group of [[Mining Guild elders|elders]] belonging to a [[Nar Kreeta]]n branch of the [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]] went to meet a [[Unidentified Hutt crime lord (Nar Kreeta)|local Hutt crimelord]] at his palace and negotiate with him. They did not return. Although the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] claimed that the elders never came, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] decided to dispatch Jaden Korr, a student at the [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]], to investigate the matter. Kyle Katarn was investigating the disappearance of another [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] student, [[Rosh Penin]], near Nar Kreeta and offered to assist Korr with the ''[[Raven's Claw]]'' by dropping him to the destination in the beginning and picking him up once the mission was complete. ==Mission== [[File:BarNarKreeta.jpg|thumb|left|Bar owned by a local Hutt crimelord]]Korr covertly entered the Hutt's palace through a ventilation system. Eavesdropping on some of the Hutt's guards, he learned that the Hutt arranged betting on vicious blood-sporting that pitted prisoners against a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]]. While investigating the Hutt's palace, Korr was attacked numerous times by the guards. Eventually, Korr discovered a number of control rooms, which were connected to small [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] scattered around the palace. Each control room contained a lever, which, when pulled, opened a door to a cell where the Mining Guild elders were held captive. ==Complications== When Korr went to assist the elders, he learned the truth of the Hutt's betting arrangements and the nature of the facility itself. The prison area and the bars surrounding were, in reality, a gambling arena inside which the rancor would chase unarmed prisoners around, and eventually devour them. The Hutt made arrangements for his guests and guards to bet on prisoners escaping the rancor. Stakes were placed on the last prisoner to be eaten. No one had yet managed to escape the rancor. Korr found the elders and instructed them to make their way to the rendezvous point where Katarn was waiting in the ''Raven's Claw'' while Korr stayed behind to distract the rancor. The plan was a success, but it is not clear if Korr managed to save all sixteen prisoners. The surviving elders escaped through the ventilation system and were picked up by Katarn in the ''Raven's Claw''. ==Behind the scenes== It is possible to kill the rancor in the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' game by dealing enough damage to it; however, a new one will spawn in its place. Not all sixteen prisoners have to escape alive in order to complete the level. The rancor and also Jaden can kill a few elders without the mission resulting in a failure. After the successful saving of the elders you can see mercenaries firing on the rancor. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Ragnos}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Nar Kreeta |es=Misión a Nar Kreeta }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nar Kreeta, mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Nar Kreeta]] [[Category:Battles of the Disciples of Ragnos crisis]] [[Category:Rescue missions]]
